preconditions: a and b must be comparable
a and b must support equality operation
postconditions: returns True if a is equal to b
returns False if a is not equal to b
edge_cases: a and b are of different types
a and b are NaN (Not a Number) values
a and b are infinity values

preconditions: a must be comparable to b
a and b must be of the same type
postconditions: eq(a, b) returns True if a is equal to b, False otherwise
edge_cases: eq(a, b) returns False if a is not equal to b
eq(a, None) raises TypeError if a is not comparable to None

agreed.groq: a and b must be comparable
agreed.hf: a must be comparable to b

groq_only: a and b must support equality operation
hf_only: a and b must be of the same type

agreed.groq: returns True if a is equal to b
agreed.hf: eq(a, b) returns True if a is equal to b, False otherwise

groq_only: returns False if a is not equal to b
a and b are of different types
a and b are NaN (Not a Number) values
a and b are infinity values
hf_only: eq(a, b) returns False if a is not equal to b
eq(a, None) raises TypeError if a is not comparable to None
